# Golden State Windows

> The San Francisco Bay Area's largest and most trusted window replacement, installation, and siding company since 1989. Over 8,000 homes serviced, rated 4.8/5 across 393 Yelp reviews (the highest of any Bay Area window company), with a full lifetime warranty on every window.

Golden State Windows is a family-run, licensed, bonded, and insured contractor serving the San Francisco Bay Area since 1989. All work is performed by 100% in-house crews (no subcontractors). Free, no-obligation consultations are available at (800) 748-6448.

## Pages

- [Home](https://goldenstatewindows.com/): Company overview, services, and reviews
- [Services](https://goldenstatewindows.com/services): Window replacement, siding, energy-efficient windows, and door installation
- [Gallery](https://goldenstatewindows.com/gallery): Selected Bay Area window, siding, and door projects
- [About](https://goldenstatewindows.com/about): History since 1989 and service-area coverage
- [Service Areas](https://goldenstatewindows.com/service-areas): Dedicated pages for Pacifica, Daly City, South San Francisco, San Mateo, San Bruno, and Burlingame
- [Reviews](https://goldenstatewindows.com/reviews): Client video testimonials and links to written reviews
- [Contact](https://goldenstatewindows.com/contact): Request a free consultation — (800) 748-6448

## Services

- [Window Replacement](https://goldenstatewindows.com/services): Full-frame and pocket replacement in vinyl, fiberglass, aluminum, and clad-wood
- [Siding](https://goldenstatewindows.com/services): Fiber-cement, engineered wood, and vinyl siding
- [Energy-Efficient Windows](https://goldenstatewindows.com/services): ENERGY STAR and Title-24 compliant windows that can lower heating and cooling costs by up to 30%
- [Door Installation](https://goldenstatewindows.com/services): Entry, patio, French, and sliding door systems

## Reviews

- [Yelp profile](https://www.yelp.com/biz/golden-state-windows-pacifica): 4.8 out of 5 across 393 reviews — the highest-rated window company in the Bay Area

## Key facts

- Founded: 1989 — over three decades in business
- Homes serviced: 8,000+
- Rating: 4.8 / 5 from 393 Yelp reviews
- Warranty: Full lifetime warranty on every window
- License: California CSLB #972301 (licensed, bonded, and insured)
- Phone: (800) 748-6448
- Email: info@goldenstatewindows.com
- Address: 1517 Palmette Ave, Pacifica, CA 94044
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM; Sunday 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Service area: San Francisco Bay Area — Pacifica, Daly City, South San Francisco, San Bruno, Millbrae, Burlingame, San Mateo, Redwood City, San Francisco, Palo Alto, Mountain View, San Jose, Fremont, Oakland, Berkeley, and Marin County
